candidate_definition_hints.text: NeRF (Neural Radiance Fields) and NeRF in the Wild using pytorch-lightning

Unofficial implementation of [NeRF](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2003.08934.pdf) (Neural Radiance Fields) using pytorch ([pytorch-lightning](https://github.com/PyTorchLightning/pytorch-lightning)). This repo doesn't aim at reproducibility, but aim at providing a simpler and faster trai…
